name: BaseScore
tagline: Look less like a farmer. Score more like a local.
description: BaseScore is a reputation-style mini app for Base users who care about airdrops, status, and clean onchain behavior. It helps hunters understand whether their wallet activity looks organic, sticky, and worth rewarding.
notes: Register this project on Base.dev after deploy.
Use the same primary URL and media assets listed here.
Deploy BaseScore as a standalone site before generating the final accountAssociation values.
